problem_text_cn: 如图2-练23(a)所示，一半径为 $R$ 的半圆柱体沿垂直于柱轴的水平方向作加速度为 $a$ 的匀加速运动。在圆柱面上搁置一竖直杆，此杆只能沿竖直方向上下运动。当半圆柱体的速度为 $v$ 时，杆与半圆柱体接触点 $P$ 的角位置为 $\theta$。求此时竖直杆运动的速度和加速度。
problem_text_en: As shown in Figure 2-23(a), a half-cylinder of radius $R$ moves horizontally perpendicular to its axis with a uniform acceleration $a$. A vertical rod rests on the cylindrical surface and can only move vertically up and down. When the speed of the half-cylinder is $v$, the angular position of the contact point $P$ between the rod and the half-cylinder is $\theta$. Find the velocity and acceleration of the vertical rod at this moment.
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】由于竖直杆作平动运动，所以其速度和加速度可由杆下端 $P$ 点的速度和加速度代表。又由于竖直杆只能作上下运动，所以杆在图2-练23(b)所示瞬间的速度竖直向上，是绝对速度 $v_P$。在半圆柱参照系看到 $P$ 点作切向运动，所以 $P$ 点相对半圆柱切向的运动速度 $v'$ 是相对速度。显然，半圆柱的水平方向速度 $v$ 是牵连速度。三者满足矢量关系
$$
v_P = v' + v \tag{1}
$$
利用图中矢量关系，得竖直杆运动的速度为
$$
v_P = v \tan\theta \tag{2}
$$

同样，可讨论竖直杆的加速度。竖直杆在图2-练23(c)所示位置的瞬时加速度竖直向上，是绝对加速度 $a_P$。在半圆柱参照系看到 $P$ 点作圆周运动，一般情况，$P$ 点相对半圆柱的相对加速度既有切向分量 $a'_t$，又有法向分量 $a'_n$。显然，半圆柱的水平方向加速度 $a$ 是牵连加速度。三种加速度满足矢量关系
$$
a_P = (a'_t + a'_n) + a \tag{3}
$$
其中 $a'_n = \dfrac{v'^2}{R}$，利用图2-练23(b)中速度矢量关系易得
$$
v' = \dfrac{v}{\cos\theta} \tag{4}
$$
于是
$$
a'_n = \dfrac{v^2}{R \cos^2\theta} \tag{5}
$$
为了得到加速度 $a_P$ 与 $a$ 的关系，可以把式(3)在 $a'_n$ 方向作投影（避免未知量 $a'_t$ 出现在方程中），得关系
$$
-a'_n = a_P \cos\theta - a \sin\theta \tag{6}
$$
代入式(5)，得竖直杆运动的加速度为
$$
a_P = a \tan\theta - \dfrac{v^2}{R \cos^3\theta} \tag{7}
$$
problem_solution_en:
【Analysis and Solution】Since the vertical rod undergoes translational motion, its velocity and acceleration are represented by those of point $P$ at its lower end. The rod can only move vertically, so its instantaneous velocity at the moment shown in Figure 2-23(b) is upward, the absolute velocity $v_P$. In the half-cylinder's frame, point $P$ moves tangentially, so the tangential velocity $v'$ relative to the half-cylinder is the relative velocity. The horizontal velocity $v$ of the half-cylinder is the牵连 velocity. The vector relationship is:
$$
v_P = v' + v \tag{1}
$$
Using the vector diagram, the velocity of the vertical rod is:
$$
v_P = v \tan\theta \tag{2}
$$

For acceleration, the rod's instantaneous acceleration at the position in Figure 2-23(c) is upward, the absolute acceleration $a_P$. In the half-cylinder's frame, $P$ moves in a circular path, so its relative acceleration has both tangential $a'_t$ and normal $a'_n$ components. The horizontal acceleration $a$ of the half-cylinder is the牵连 acceleration. The acceleration vector relationship is:
$$
a_P = (a'_t + a'_n) + a \tag{3}
$$
The normal component is $a'_n = \dfrac{v'^2}{R}$. From the velocity vector diagram:
$$
v' = \dfrac{v}{\cos\theta} \tag{4}
$$
Thus:
$$
a'_n = \dfrac{v^2}{R \cos^2\theta} \tag{5}
$$
Projecting equation (3) onto the direction of $a'_n$ (to eliminate $a'_t$):
$$
-a'_n = a_P \cos\theta - a \sin\theta \tag{6}
$$
Substituting (5) into (6) gives the acceleration of the vertical rod:
$$
a_P = a \tan\theta - \dfrac{v^2}{R \cos^3\theta} \tag{7}
$$

半圆柱与竖直杆的初始位置示意图（图2-练23(a)）。

速度矢量关系分析图（图2-练23(b)）。

加速度矢量关系分析图（图2-练23(c)）。
img_en:
Initial position diagram of the half-cylinder and vertical rod (Figure 2-23(a)).

Velocity vector relationship analysis (Figure 2-23(b)).

Acceleration vector relationship analysis (Figure 2-23(c)).
problem_answer:
1) 竖直杆的速度为 $v_P = v \tan\theta$；
2) 竖直杆的加速度为 $a_P = a \tan\theta - \dfrac{v^2}{R \cos^3\theta}$。
